scripts.setup: npm --prefix web install && python3 -m pip install -r services/attendance_service/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,face -c cyan,green "cd web && npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "cd services/attendance_service && python3 -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8010 --reload"
